channel.title: LLM Timeline — Anthropic Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from Anthropic.

item.title: Claude Sonnet 4.6 (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: 400B License: open Type: model 1M context. Announce: https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-sonnet-4-6 Showing GMMLU (Global MMLU by Cohere).

item.title: Claude Opus 4.5 (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: 5000B License: open Type: model "the best model in the world for coding, agents, and computer use." Announce: https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-opus-4-5

item.title: Claude Sonnet 4.5 (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: 400B License: open Type: model The Claude Sonnet 4.5 "system card" is an absolute farce. Announce: https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-sonnet-4-5

item.title: Claude Opus 4 (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: 6000B License: open Type: model "Claude Opus 4 is our most intelligent model to date, pushing the frontier in coding, agentic search, and creative writing. With advanced reasoning and powerful collaboration capabilities…Both models can also alternate between reasoning and tool use—like web search—to improve responses…Claude Opus 4 can work continuously for hours on complex, long-running tasks"

item.title: Claude 3.7 Sonnet (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: 175B License: open Type: model Knowledge cutoff now November 2024 (was April 2024). "the first hybrid reasoning model on the market." https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-3-7-sonnet

item.title: Claude 3.5 Sonnet (new) (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: 175B License: open Type: model Absurd naming scheme. Paper addendum pp51-64: https://assets.anthropic.com/m/61e7d27f8c8f5919/original/Claude-3-Model-Card.pdf#page=51

item.title: Claude 3.5 Sonnet (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: closed Type: model MMLU=90.4 with prompting. Model card: https://www-cdn.anthropic.com/fed9cc193a14b84131812372d8d5857f8f304c52/Model_Card_Claude_3_Addendum.pdf

item.title: Claude 3 Opus (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: 2500B License: open Type: model Original MMLU=86.8 (GPT-4=86.4). MMLU=88.2 with CoT prompting. Original GPQA=50.4. 200k context, 1M for researchers.

item.title: Claude 2.1 (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: 130B License: open Type: model Less hallucinations, 200k context length, tool use

item.title: Claude 2 (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: 130B License: open Type: model More HHH, 200k context length

item.title: RL-CAI (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: 52B License: closed Type: model RLAIF=reinforcement learning with AI feedback

item.title: Anthropic-LM 52B (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: 52B License: closed Type: model Internal research only
